sections.paragraph:
verb לספוח

to attach, append, join to, annex, absorb

verb להיספח

be attached, appended, joined to, absorbed

verb לספח

to annex, attach, coopt, affiliate

verb סופח

be annexed, attached, coopted, affiliated

verb להסתפח

be annexed; attached

verb לספח (>>סיפח)

to annex, attach, coopt, affiliate

masculine noun

tab; appendix
